basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Postdoctoral Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website. The last date to submit the application form is 22-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Environmental/Civil/Energy/Chemical or relevant field
qualification.details: PhD in Environmental/Civil/Energy/Chemical or any other relevant department from a recognized university/institute, with experience in Biomass Pretreatment and/or thermochemical conversion, Life Cycle assessment. Candidates who have submitted their thesis may also apply. Applicants must have secured a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent grade) from the undergraduate level onwards, and at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in both Class 10 and 12.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: PhD in Environmental/Civil/Energy/Chemical or relevant field

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PhD in Environmental/Civil/Energy/Chemical or any other relevant department from a recognized university/institute, with experience in Biomass Pretreatment and/or thermochemical conversion, Life Cycle assessment. Candidates who have submitted their thesis may also apply. Applicants must have secured a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent grade) from the undergraduate level onwards, and at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in both Class 10 and 12.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Application Fee 2026
IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 22-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Environmental/Civil/Energy/Chemical or a relevant field from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Postdoctoral Fellow position ranges from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Postdoctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have submitted their thesis apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have submitted their thesis are eligible to apply for this Postdoctoral Fellow position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Application Review followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IP/10129/Advt0254 DATED 03.07.2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which website should I visit to apply online?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.
